What VisionX Offers

Color Simulation

Simulate Protanopia, Deuteranopia, and Tritanopia using precise color transformation matrices applied pixel-by-pixel on the HTML5 Canvas.

Try it

Contrast Checker

Verify text and background combinations against WCAG 2.1 AA (4.5:1) and AAA (7:1) standards instantly — no additional tools needed.

Try it

Smart Suggestions

Receive automated color palette recommendations that are both visually stunning and comprehensively accessible for every type of user.

Explore

Simple Workflow

How VisionX Works

Three easy steps to make your designs fully accessible.

01

Upload Your Image

Drag and drop any image directly onto the tool. Supports PNG, JPG, WebP, and GIF formats.

02

Select a Simulation

Choose from Protanopia, Deuteranopia, or Tritanopia. Adjust the intensity slider for partial simulation.

03

Compare & Download

Hold the Before/After button to compare, then download the processed image as a lossless PNG.

Supported Simulations

Types of Color Blindness

Understand what each simulation represents and who it affects.

Protanopia

Red-blind

Affects approximately 1% of males. Red and green hues are difficult to distinguish; reds appear much darker.

~1% of males affected worldwide
Deuteranopia

Green-blind

The most common form, affecting around 6% of males. Green and red are confused; greens appear yellowish.

~6% of males — most common form
Tritanopia

Blue-blind

Rare, affecting less than 0.01% of people. Blue and yellow are indistinguishable; blues appear greenish.

<0.01% — rarest form

Questions

Frequently Asked

Is my image uploaded to a server?

No — VisionX is 100% client-side. Your image is processed entirely in your browser using the HTML5 Canvas API. Nothing is ever uploaded or stored.

Which image formats are supported?

Any format your browser can render — PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF (static), BMP, and SVG. For best results use PNG or WebP.

How accurate are the simulations?

VisionX uses the Brettel/Viénot/Mollon color transformation matrices, which are the industry standard for clinically accurate color blindness simulation.

Can I use this for commercial projects?

Yes. VisionX is free to use in any project, commercial or personal. Attribution is appreciated but not required.

Start making your designs inclusive today.

Upload any image and see it through the eyes of a color blind user in seconds — no account, no install.
